25. Effects of Exalted Planets etc.
If a planet is exalted, it gives auspicious results to full extent. It is futile, if in debilitation. The
results are limited in an enemys camp. The auspicious effects given by a planet are ? in a
friendly House, ? in own House and ? in Mlatrikona Rasi.
26. Inauspiciousness of Planets.
A planet is fully inauspicious, if it is in its debilitation; it is somewhat better in inimical House. Its
